evidence.quote: _Browse like no one’s watching. The new Firefox Focus automatically blocks a wide range of online trackers — from the moment you launch it to the second you leave it. Easily erase your history, passwords and cookies, so you won’t get followed by things like unwanted ads._
We explicitly disable the ability to uniquely identify users from their crash reports.

Sentry is enabled when the *Send Usage Data* switch in the *Focus* settings is enabled by the user. By default this switch is enabled in Focus and is an *opt-out* mechanism. In Klar, by default this switch is disabled and is an *opt-in* mechanism.
This kind of reporting gives Mozilla invaluable insight as to why Focus crashes or incorrectly behaves. It is one of the key methods we use to improve the product in terms of stability.

APK size has been a long-term concern of the Firefox for Android team. A large APK size has been problematic for partnership deals and distribution in countries where bandwidth is limited or expensive.
